---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for CareerOS Lite
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A short, clear summary of the feature you are proposing.

---

## Problem This Solves

Describe the situation where you would use this feature. What is currently missing or frustrating?

---

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you would like to happen. Where in the application would this live? How would a user interact with it?

---

## Alternatives Considered

Did you consider any other approaches? Why do you prefer the one above?

---

## Additional Context

Mockups, links to similar implementations, or any other context that helps illustrate the idea.

---

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I would like to open a pull request for this
- [ ] No, I am proposing it for others to consider
